ERMESS_scripts.reporting package¶

Created on Tue Mar 3 12:30:10 2026

@author: jlegalla

Submodules¶

ERMESS_scripts.reporting.ERMESS_KPI_functions module¶

Created on Mon May 11 16:54:12 2026

@author: JoPHOBEA

ERMESS_scripts.reporting.ERMESS_KPI_functions.annualize(values, Context)[source]¶
ERMESS_scripts.reporting.ERMESS_KPI_functions.compute_KPI(solution, Context, datetime)[source]¶

Compute comprehensive KPI metrics for a microgrid optimization solution.

This function evaluates a complete microgrid configuration (given by a candidate solution) and computes technical, economic, environmental, operational, and dispatching-related Key Performance Indicators (KPIs).

The computation adapts to the optimization mode: - “research”: simplified dispatching model stored in the solution object - “pro”: detailed EMS-based simulation using full operational models

The function orchestrates multiple sub-models including: - energy balance reconstruction - storage dynamics - grid interactions - diesel generator operation - demand-side management (DSM) - economic evaluation - environmental impact assessment

Args :
solutionobject

Candidate solution of the optimization problem. Contains decision variables such as:

  • production_set

  • storage_TS

  • D_DSM / Y_DSM

  • trades

Context :
object

Simulation environment containing:

  • production assets and time series

  • storage characteristics

  • load profiles (DSM and non-DSM)

  • grid/genset configuration

  • optimization mode (research or pro)

datetimearray-like

Time index of the simulation period.

Returns :

dict

Dictionary containing all computed KPI groups:

TimeSeries

Full time series of production, storage, DSM, trades, and losses.

Technical

Performance indicators (self-sufficiency, autonomy, capacity factor).

Economics

Economic indicators (LCOE, CAPEX, OPEX, net cost, revenues).

Storage

Storage-related metrics (SOC, cycles, losses, lifetime usage).

Genset

Diesel generator operation metrics (if applicable).

Environment

Environmental indicators (CO2 emissions, fossil energy share).

Flows

Annual energy flows (imports, exports, production, consumption).

EnergyAllocation

Detailed decomposition of energy usage between sources.

DSM

Demand-side management indicators (daily and yearly shifting).

EMS (optional)

Only available in “pro” mode. EMS-level operational KPIs.

net_load

Net load profile after dispatching.

cost_decomposition

Breakdown of total system cost by component.

installation_lifetime

Estimated lifetime of installed assets.

Notes :

  • In “pro” mode, additional EMS simulation is executed via LFE_CCE().

  • In “research” mode, simplified dispatching results are used directly.

  • The function is computationally intensive due to multiple KPI layers.

  • Designed for post-processing of optimization results, not real-time use.

ERMESS_scripts.reporting.ERMESS_KPI_functions.storage_charge_energy(mask, n_store, dispatching_timeseries, Context)[source]¶

Annual charged energy into storage (kWh/year).

ERMESS_scripts.reporting.ERMESS_KPI_functions.storage_discharge_energy(mask, n_store, dispatching_timeseries, Context)[source]¶

Annual discharged energy from storage (kWh/year).

ERMESS_scripts.reporting.ERMESS_evaluation_operators module¶

Created on Thu Apr 11 12:00:55 2024

@author: jlegalla Runs the evaluation of each operators of the ERMESS RESEARCH algorithm

ERMESS_scripts.reporting.charts_config module¶

Created on Mon Apr 13 21:17:59 2026

@author: JoPHOBEA

ERMESS_scripts.reporting.charts_config.get_charts_config(Context)[source]¶

ERMESS_scripts.reporting.graphs module¶

Created on Mon Feb 10 11:49:19 2025

@author: JoPHOBEA

ERMESS_scripts.reporting.graphs.plot(data_points)[source]¶

Plots a simple line chart of the provided data points using Plotly.

Parameters:

data_points (array-like) – Sequence of numerical values to be plotted on the y-axis. The x-axis is automatically generated as a range from 0 to len(data_points)-1.

Returns:

This function displays the plot and does not return any value.

Return type:

None

ERMESS_scripts.reporting.graphs_excel module¶

Created on Mon Apr 13 14:32:51 2026

@author: JoPHOBEA

ERMESS_scripts.reporting.graphs_excel.add_excel_charts(Context, charts_configurations)[source]¶

ERMESS_scripts.reporting.post_processing module¶

Created on Tue Mar 3 13:50:18 2026

@author: JoPHOBEA

ERMESS_scripts.reporting.post_processing.build_results(solution, baseline_solution, Context, datetime)[source]¶

Build all post-processing result tables for a solution.

This function evaluates the solution, computes comparison metrics against the baseline scenario, and generates all post-processing DataFrames used for exports and visualization.

Parameters:

  • solution – Optimized solution object.

  • Context – Global ERMESS context object.

  • datetime (np.ndarray | pandas.DatetimeIndex) – Simulation timestamps.

Returns:

Container gathering all generated post-processing tables and indicators.

Return type:

_PostProcessingResults

ERMESS_scripts.reporting.post_processing.compute_economic_comparisons(outputs_solution, output_baseline)[source]¶
ERMESS_scripts.reporting.post_processing.export_to_excel(results, Context)[source]¶
ERMESS_scripts.reporting.post_processing.output_build_production(solution, Context)[source]¶
ERMESS_scripts.reporting.post_processing.post_traitement(solution, Context, datetime)[source]¶

Run the complete post-processing workflow.

This function generates post-processing results and exports them according to the configuration defined in the context.

Parameters:

  • solution – Optimized solution object.

  • Context – Global ERMESS context object.

  • datetime (np.ndarray | pandas.DatetimeIndex) – Simulation timestamps.
